data.name: MaterialBoxList_Display
data.comment: Display name for the control

data.name: MaterialBoxList_Desc
data.value: Mobile-first list of material boxes on storage locations: per-box material counter, long-press (or button) to inspect the contained materials, and a swipe/button action that marks a box as taken. Optimistic UI with a 5 s undo. Trilingual (DE/EN/FR).
data.comment: Description for the control

data.name: boxDataset_Display
data.comment: Display name for the bound dataset

data.name: boxDataset_Desc
data.value: The material boxes shown as the master list. Columns, sorting and filtering come from the bound view.
data.comment: Description for the bound dataset

data.name: childEntityName_Display
data.comment: Display name for the child entity property

data.name: childEntityName_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the child table whose rows are counted per box and shown in the overlay (1:n from the box). Example: sst_material.
data.comment: Description for the child entity property

data.name: childLookupField_Display
data.comment: Display name for the child lookup property

data.name: childLookupField_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the lookup column on the child table that points back to the box (queried as _<name>_value). Example: sst_materialbox.
data.comment: Description for the child lookup property

data.name: childDisplayColumns_Display
data.comment: Display name for the child display columns property

data.name: childDisplayColumns_Desc
data.value: Comma-separated logical names of the child columns shown in the overlay; the first is the material name. Example: sst_name,sst_quantity,sst_unit.
data.comment: Description for the child display columns property

data.name: childFilter_Display
data.comment: Display name for the child filter property

data.name: childFilter_Desc
data.value: Optional OData $filter appended to the batch query, e.g. statecode eq 0. Keep it simple — no aggregates, offline-compatible.
data.comment: Description for the child filter property

data.name: swipeFieldName_Display
data.comment: Display name for the swipe field property

data.name: swipeFieldName_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the box column set when a box is marked as taken. Recommended: a DateTime column (audit timestamp). Example: sst_takenon.
data.comment: Description for the swipe field property

data.name: swipeFieldValue_Display
data.comment: Display name for the swipe value property

data.name: swipeFieldValue_Desc
data.value: Value written to the take-out field: "@now" for the current timestamp (recommended), "true"/"false" for a Boolean, digits for an OptionSet, otherwise text.
data.comment: Description for the swipe value property

data.name: takenBehavior_Display
data.comment: Display name for the taken-behavior property

data.name: takenBehavior_Desc
data.value: How already-taken boxes appear: hide (removed from the list), gray (dimmed, action disabled) or allow-undo (dimmed, can be reverted). Default: gray.
data.comment: Description for the taken-behavior property

data.name: takenBehavior_hide
data.comment: Enum value: hide taken boxes

data.name: takenBehavior_gray
data.comment: Enum value: gray out taken boxes

data.name: takenBehavior_allowUndo
data.comment: Enum value: allow undo of taken boxes
